title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 444.080 - Order to be read
text:
444.080.  Order to be read. — The surveyor shall, before entering upon said duty, read said order to the party or parties owning, controlling or working any shaft or shafts on said lot or lots or tract of land.
(RSMo 1939 § 14790) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13600; 1919 § 7443; 1909 § 8415
